Name: Honey Trade
Description: A naturally occurring narcotic substance, classified as strictly illegal across all Major Factions.

Mental Effects.description: Extremely stimulating in small doses. Induces profound psychosis in high doses.
Mental Effects.impact: High demand among nobility and strategists for its cognitive benefits. Psychotic effects create a volatile and unpredictable user base in the underworld.

Physical Effects.description: Physically numbing with slowed reaction times. Moderate use is akin to alcohol intoxication.
Physical Effects.impact: Can be used as a potent incapacitating agent. Users are physically vulnerable, making them easy targets for exploitation or elimination.

Potency.description: A single drop or two, diluted to the consistency of water, is enough to completely incapacitate a person.
Potency.impact: Extremely high value-to-weight ratio makes it ideal for smuggling. Small quantities can disrupt large organizations or disable key personnel.

Handling Hazard.description: The raw substance is so potent it can be absorbed through the skin.
Handling Hazard.impact: Creates a high-risk bottleneck at the processing stage. Only specialized, high-level operatives (known as 'Cut-Masters') can safely dilute it, consolidating power and profit. Accidental self-dosing is a constant threat.

Ecological Niche.description: The creation of Ichor-Honey is not a simple agricultural process but a closed, self-sustaining ecological trap.
Ecological Niche.impact: Its unique production cycle, extreme potency, and hazardous handling requirements ensure that only a select few can ever hope to control it.

Strategic Implication.description: This commodity is the definitive high-risk, high-reward resource, defined by its chokepoints.
Strategic Implication.impact: The exclusive and uniquely qualified group that dares to harvest it holds a profound influence over the global black market.
